azkar.arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
azkar.transliteration: Asbahna wa asbahal-mulku lillah, walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa ala kulli shay'in qadeer.
azkar.translation: We have reached the morning and at this very time the entire kingdom belongs to Allah. All praise is due to Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without any partner.
azkar.virtue: Whoever says this in the morning, it is as if he has freed four slaves from the sons of Isma'il.

azkar.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا، وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا، وَبِكَ نَحْيَا، وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ
azkar.transliteration: Allahumma bika asbahna, wa bika amsayna, wa bika nahya, wa bika namootu wa ilaikan-nushoor.
azkar.translation: O Allah, by You we enter the morning and by You we enter the evening, by You we live and by You we die, and to You is the Resurrection.

azkar.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ
azkar.transliteration: Allahumma anta rabbi la ilaha illa ant, khalaqtani wa ana abduk, wa ana ala ahdika wa wa'dika mastata't.
azkar.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshipped except You, You created me and I am Your servant and I abide to Your covenant and promise as best I can.
azkar.virtue: The Master of Prayers for forgiveness. Whoever recites it during the day with firm faith in it, and dies on the same day before the evening, he will be from the people of Paradise.

azkar.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
azkar.transliteration: Subhanallahi wabihamdih.
azkar.translation: How perfect Allah is and I praise Him.
azkar.virtue: Whoever says this 100 times in a day will have his sins forgiven even if they are like the foam of the sea.

azkar.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
azkar.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-afwa wal-afiyata fid-dunya wal-akhirah.
azkar.translation: O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being in this life and the next.

azkar.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
azkar.transliteration: Bismillahil-ladhi la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fil-ardi wala fis-sama'i wahuwa as-sami'ul-aleem.
azkar.translation: In the name of Allah, with Whose name nothing can cause harm on Earth or in the heavens, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
azkar.virtue: Whoever recites this 3 times in the morning will not be afflicted by any calamity before evening.

azkar.arabic: رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبًّا، وَبِالْإِسْلَامِ دِينًا، وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ نَبِيًّا
azkar.transliteration: Raditu billahi rabba, wa bil-Islami deena, wa bi-Muhammadin sallallahu alayhi wa sallama nabiyya.
azkar.translation: I am pleased with Allah as a Lord, and Islam as a religion, and Muhammad (ﷺ) as a Prophet.
azkar.virtue: It is incumbent upon Allah to please whoever says this.

azkar.arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
azkar.transliteration: Amsayna wa amsal-mulku lillah, walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa ala kulli shay'in qadeer.
azkar.translation: We have reached the evening and at this very time sovereignty belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner.

azkar.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا، وَبِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا، وَبِكَ نَحْيَا، وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
azkar.transliteration: Allahumma bika amsayna, wa bika asbahna, wa bika nahya, wa bika namootu wa ilaykal-maseer.
azkar.translation: O Allah, by You we enter the evening and by You we enter the morning, by You we live and by You we die, and to You is the final return.

azkar.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ
azkar.transliteration: Astaghfirullah.
azkar.translation: I seek forgiveness from Allah.

azkar.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ، وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ، تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ
azkar.transliteration: Allahumma antas-salam, wa minkas-salam, tabarakta ya dhal-jalali wal-ikram.
azkar.translation: O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, O Owner of majesty and honour.

azkar.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ
azkar.transliteration: Subhanallah.
azkar.translation: How perfect Allah is.

azkar.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
azkar.transliteration: Alhamdulillah.
azkar.translation: All praise is due to Allah.

azkar.arabic: اللهُ أَكْبَرُ
azkar.transliteration: Allahu Akbar.
azkar.translation: Allah is the Greatest.

azkar.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
azkar.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, lahul-mulku walahul-hamd, wahuwa ala kulli shay'in qadeer.
azkar.translation: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, to Him belongs all sovereignty and praise and He is over all things omnipotent.
azkar.virtue: His sins will be forgiven even if they are like the foam of the sea.

azkar.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
azkar.transliteration: Bismika Allahumma amootu wa ahya.
azkar.translation: In Your name O Allah, I die and I live.

azkar.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ قِنِي عَذَابَكَ يَوْمَ تَبْعَثُ عِبَادَكَ
azkar.transliteration: Allahumma qini adhabaka yawma tab'athu ibadak.
azkar.translation: O Allah, protect me from Your punishment on the day Your servants are resurrected.

azkar.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ
azkar.transliteration: Subhanallah.
azkar.translation: How perfect Allah is.

azkar.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
azkar.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushoor.
azkar.translation: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after having taken it from us and unto Him is the Resurrection.

azkar.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي عَبْدُكَ، ابْنُ عَبْدِكَ، ابْنُ أَمَتِكَ، نَاصِيَتِي بِيَدِكَ، مَاضٍ فِيَّ حُكْمُكَ، عَدْلٌ فِيَّ قَضَاؤُكَ
azkar.transliteration: Allahumma inni abduk, ibnu abdik, ibnu amatik, nasiyati biyadik, madin fiyya hukmuk, adlun fiyya qada'uk.
azkar.translation: O Allah, I am Your slave and the son of Your male slave and the son of your female slave. My forehead is in Your Hand. Your judgment upon me is assured and whatever You have decreed for me is just.
azkar.virtue: Allah will remove his sorrow and replace it with happiness.

azkar.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
azkar.transliteration: La ilaha illallahul-azimul-halim, la ilaha illallahu rabbul-arshil-azim.
azkar.translation: There is none worthy of worship except Allah, the Mighty, the Forbearing. There is none worthy of worship except Allah, Lord of the Magnificent Throne.

azkar.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
azkar.transliteration: A'udhu bikalimatillahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq.
azkar.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.
azkar.virtue: Whoever recites this 3 times in the evening will be protected from snake bites until morning.

azkar.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
azkar.transliteration: Bismillahil-ladhi la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fil-ardi wala fis-sama'i wahuwa as-sami'ul-aleem.
azkar.translation: In the name of Allah with Whose name nothing is harmed on earth nor in the heavens and He is All-Seer, All-Knower.

azkar.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
azkar.transliteration: Bismillah.
azkar.translation: In the name of Allah.

azkar.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنَا وَسَقَانَا، وَجَعَلَنَا مُسْلِمِينَ
azkar.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi at'amana wa saqana, wa ja'alana muslimeen.
azkar.translation: All praise is for Allah who fed us and gave us drink, and made us Muslims.

azkar.arabic: اللهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللهُ أَكْبَرُ، سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ
azkar.transliteration: Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar, Subhanal-ladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrineen, wa inna ila rabbina lamunqaliboon.
azkar.translation: Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest. How perfect He is, the One Who has placed this (transport) at our service, and we ourselves would not have been capable of that, and to our Lord is our final destiny.
